description: MemoryLens retrieval benchmark. 48 fuzzy-memory queries (6 categories x 8, easy/medium/hard). Every expected title exists in the seeded catalog WITH an embedding, so retrieval can always find it in principle. `expected` is a list: any listed title counts as a hit (matched loosely via app.ai.matching.same_title, so franchise variants like 'The Last Of Us Remastered' also count).

cases.query: twelve jurors argue in one hot room about whether a boy is guilty of murder
a huge ship hits an iceberg and sinks, a poor artist falls in love with a rich girl on board
a hacker discovers reality is a computer simulation and has to choose between a red and a blue pill
thieves who enter people's dreams to plant an idea, it ends with a spinning top on a table
a man slowly realizes his entire life is a television show and everyone around him is an actor
a slow-witted but kind man from alabama keeps ending up at famous historical moments and runs across the country
a banker is wrongly imprisoned for decades and digs an escape tunnel hidden behind a poster of an actress
farmers leave a dying dusty earth through a wormhole, time passes slower for them near a black hole
a chemistry teacher with cancer starts cooking drugs with a former student to leave money for his family
six friends in new york who hang out in a coffee shop, one is a paleontologist
kids in a small 80s town search for their missing friend and meet a girl with psychic powers, there is an upside down world
people drowning in debt play deadly versions of children's playground games for a giant cash prize
noble families scheme and fight over an iron throne while dragons return and a long winter comes
everyday life at a paper company filmed like a documentary, the boss is cringy and thinks he is hilarious
a german small town where missing children turn out to be connected by time travel across several generations
robbers in red jumpsuits and salvador dali masks lock themselves inside the royal mint with hostages
is this the real life or is this just fantasy, a six minute rock song with an opera section
disco song about a girl who is young and sweet, only seventeen, queen of the dance floor
the singer calls himself a weirdo who doesn't belong here, sad 90s rock
the love theme from the movie about the sinking ship, near far wherever you are
a small town girl and a city boy take a midnight train going anywhere
everyone plays it at weddings like a love song but it is actually about a stalker watching someone
a lady is sure all that glitters is gold, a slow epic that builds into a famous guitar solo
an irish band's angry grunge song written after a bombing killed children, about what's in your head
an orphan boy discovers he is a famous wizard and gets a letter inviting him to a school of magic
expected: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone

cases.query: farm animals overthrow the farmer and the pigs slowly become the new tyrants
a travelling salesman wakes up one morning transformed into a giant insect
a small-town lawyer defends a black man falsely accused in the racist american south, narrated by his young daughter
a homebody creature is dragged by dwarves on a quest to steal treasure back from a dragon
a desert planet with giant sandworms and a spice that lets people see the future
a witty young woman and a proud wealthy man keep misjudging each other in old english society
a young lawyer travels to a castle in transylvania, the story is told through letters and diary entries
blocky sandbox game where you mine blocks, build houses and green creatures explode at night
you inherit your grandfather's run-down farm, grow crops, go mining and marry a villager
a white haired monster hunter for hire searches a war-torn fantasy world for his adopted daughter
three criminals pull off heists in a fake los angeles, one of them is an unhinged maniac
a smuggler escorts an immune teenage girl across a zombie fungus apocalypse america
you solve test chambers with a gun that shoots linked holes in walls while a sarcastic AI mocks you
a red haired huntress fights robot dinosaurs in the wilds and uncovers how the old world ended
open world where dragons have returned, you absorb their souls and shout enemies off cliffs
the iron man actor who made a huge comeback after addiction problems
the actor from titanic and inception who finally won his oscar for a movie where a bear attacks him
deep calm voice, often plays god or narrates documentaries, was in shawshank
famously kind actor who plays neo and a legendary dog-avenging hitman
played a slow-witted runner from alabama and a man stranded on an island talking to a volleyball
rubber-faced 90s comedian with green mask and pet detective roles who later went serious
won an oscar for playing a cannibal psychiatrist despite barely any screen time
the actress who grew up playing a brilliant witch student and later became a UN women ambassador
